title: Adminer Import Timeout? Fixes That Actually Work
description: Adminer is lighter than phpMyAdmin, but imports can still time out. Here’s how to fix it.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Adminer is great for quick tasks, but large imports still hit execution limits.
Smaller chunks complete within time limits and reduce server load.
See also: **How to Fix phpMyAdmin Import Timeout Errors**.

content.title: Avoid Adminer timeouts
content.text: Split large SQL files into smaller parts.

faq.question: Is Adminer better than phpMyAdmin for big imports?
faq.answer: It’s lighter, but the same size limits still apply.
